1062.issue: [E1062] js-controller dependency missing. js-controller 6.0.11 is required as minimum. Please add to dependencies at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.wireless-settings/blob/master/io-package.json).

1078.issue: [W1078] "common.materialize" is deprecated for admin >= 5 at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.wireless-settings/blob/master/io-package.json). Please use property "common.adminUI.config".

1090.issue: [E1090] admin dependency missing. admin 7.6.17 is required as minimum, 7.6.20 is recommended. Please add to globalDependencies at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.wireless-settings/blob/master/io-package.json).

2004.issue: [E2004] Version "1.1.0" listed at common.news at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.wireless-settings/blob/master/io-package.json) does not exist at [NPM](https://www.npmjs.com/package/iobroker.wireless-settings). Please remove from news section.

3027.issue: [W3027] "test-and-release.yml": testing for OS windows, macos is missing in job "adapter-tests". Add corresponding tests to "test-and-release.yml" or adapt [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.wireless-settings/blob/master/package.json) "os" accordingly.

4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5005.issue: [W5005] setTimeout() found in source files (src/main.ts) but no clearTimeout() detected.

8901.issue: [S8901] Dependabot configuration file ".github/dependabot.yml" not found. Consider adding dependabot to keep dependencies up to date.

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-license 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.wireless-settings/blob/master/package.json)

0058.issue: [E0058] Attribute "os1" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.wireless-settings/blob/master/package.json) is not supported. Please remove.

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. The current engines.node clause ">=20" allows Node.js 20.0.0 as minimum. Please update it to require at least ">=22" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.wireless-settings/blob/master/package.json).

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.wireless-settings/blob/master/package.json)

0050.issue: [W0050] Package 'axios' listed as devDependency at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.wireless-settings/blob/master/package.json) might be obsolete if using '@iobroker/adapter-dev'.

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^22.7.4" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.wireless-settings/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
